title: Missing Mob Drops
description: Mobs that don't have any loot, now do!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b5d10fdff93ee92c5f5f261bad540548e04e528.png)

More than 20% of Minecraft mobs don't drop any loot, and that's why I created this data pack. This data pack fills the gap, and adds loot to almost every mob in a vanilla friendly way (hopefully).

## Loot Tables

- Allay: 1 Amethyst Shard | Looting: ❌
- Armadillo: 1 - 2 Armadillo Scutes | Looting: ❌
- Axolotl: 0 - 1 Slimeballs | Looting: ✅ + 1 Random Fish | Looting: ❌
- Bat: 0 - 1 Phantom Membrane | Looting: ✅
- Bee: 0 - 2 Honeycomb | Looting: ❌
- Camel: 0 - 2 Cactus | Looting: ❌
- Creaking: 1 - 2 Resin Clump | Looting: ❌
- Ender Dragon: 22 - 34 Leather + 5 Diamonds, 3 Gold Ingots, 3 Fire Charges, 2 Blaze Powder | Looting: ❌
- Endermite: 0 - 1 Ender Pearl | Looting: ✅
- Fox: 0 - 2 Sweet Berries OR Glow Berries | Looting: ❌
- Frog: 0 - 2 Slimeballs | Looting: ✅
- Goat: 0 - 2 Leather + 0 - 2 Mutton | Looting: ✅
- Ocelot: 0 - 2 String | Looting: ❌
- Piglin Brute: 0 - 1 Rotten Flesh + 0 - 1 Gold Ingot | Looting: ✅
- Sniffer: 1 - 2 Moss Block + 0 - 2 Torchflower Seeds | Looting: ✅
- Vex: 0 - 2 Feather + 0 - 1 Ghast Tear | Looting: ✅
- Villager: 1 - 4 Emeralds | Looting: ❌
- Wolf: 0 - 1 Bone | Looting: ❌
